PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CC_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then pr-fitness prompt --pr "$(echo $CC_TOOL_OUTPUT | grep -oE 'https://github.com/[^ ]+' | head -1)"; fi
PostToolUse.description: PR Fitness: assigns an exercise after creating a PR. If it outputs a daily choice menu, respond with the exercise name or 'random', then Claude will call 'pr-fitness choose <name>' followed by 'pr-fitness prompt' again.
